query: I was charged twice this month and I want a refund.
final_response: We're sorry, we could not generate a verified response at this time. Please contact our support team directly.

rejected_fragments.fragment: It sounds like you've been charged twice. We can investigate this and process a refund for the duplicate charge. Please provide your transaction ID, and the refund will typically be processed within 5-7 business days.

I understand you've been charged twice and are requesting a refund. As an automated system, I cannot directly process refunds or make definitive statements regarding eligibility. To resolve this, I need to escalate your request to a human support agent who can access your account details and apply our refund policies based on your plan type. They will contact you shortly to assist further.
Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. To investigate and process a refund, please contact support with your transaction ID. We will refund the duplicate charge within 5-7 business days.
Oh no, I'm so sorry to hear you've been charged twice this month. I understand this can be very frustrating, and I'm here to help you get this resolved.
